name: Floral Kids' Sleeping Bag - Pillowfort™
description: They'll stay comfortable while camping out in the wild with this Floral Sleeping Bag from Pillowfort™. Made from soft fabric with ample filling to keep them nice and snug, this rectangular sleeping bag features a floral pattern on one side and a pink and white checkered pattern on the other for a vibrant look. The sleeping bag is designed to fit kids up to 57 inches tall and has a tie closure to make it easy for them to pack up and carry it.
